title: aira cuprina
intro: Aira cuprina, also known as Wood Meadow-grass or Wood Brome, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aira cuprina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Aira cuprina can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal benefits, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
